description: Hot-swap, input protection, PMBus telemetry controller

description: 100V Linear FET for hot-swap and eFuse paths

description: Digital power controller for foot 24V to 36V-class output and arm 24V rail generation

description: Single-channel gate driver for PDU main DC/DC stage
notes: Two main DC/DC rails; quantity depends on topology and number of phases/switches

Old low-current provisional arm output switch; initial arm estimate is 30A continuous, 60A 10s peak, 90A 100ms peak, so reselect BTH50015-class, parallel, or external-FET eFuse solution

description: 20mOhm 12V/24V smart high-side switch with protection and diagnosis

description: 31mOhm 12V/24V smart high-side switch with protection and diagnosis

description: Multiple-output PMIC for MCU supply, watchdog, and reset monitoring

Initial CAN 1Mbps, fixed actuator Node IDs, future CAN FD-capable physical layer

description: Medium-range coreless current sensor for lower-current arm output
